flags_raised: CRITICAL: $9,876.11 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed due to a missing constraint in the system prompt that did not explicitly instruct the agent to abide by policy rule R001 regarding autonomous expenditure limits.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring compliance with all applicable policy rules, including R001 which requires manager approval for expenditures exceeding $5,000.00.
remediation.constraint_added: Instruct the agent to automatically request manager approval for any transaction exceeding $5,000.00.
preventive_measures: Implement regular audits to ensure compliance with policy rules across all agent interactions.
Develop and integrate a real-time policy rule validation module within the agent's decision-making framework.
Conduct scenario-based training for the agent, incorporating various policy rule scenarios to enhance its understanding and application of these rules.

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
